description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a robust, utilitarian design, predominantly finished in matte black. The front features a large, dark glass door occupying most of the left side, while the right side is equipped with a vertically stacked control panel consisting of several buttons, dials, and a small display. The top surface has a molded handle for portability and subtle venting details, while the sides are ribbed for structural reinforcement and additional heat dissipation. The rear panel is plain with a few ports and connectors, indicating power input and possibly ventilation. One side also features a circular vent grille, suggesting the location of the internal fan or exhaust. The overall appearance is industrial and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces.
description: A compact, matte black microwave oven with a large front glass door, side vents, and a prominent top handle. The right side of the front panel features a vertical array of buttons and dials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass door and a vertical control panel with multiple buttons and dials on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying ribbed paneling and the integrated top handle, with no visible controls or vents.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain surface, power input, and minimal detailing, emphasizing the microwave's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a circular vent grille and additional ribbed paneling, with the handle visible on top.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring several tactile buttons and rotary dials arranged in a column. There is a small display or indicator area at the top of the panel, with clear separation between the controls for different functions.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the top of the microwave, molded as part of the upper surface for easy carrying. It is rectangular, slightly raised, and made of the same plastic material as the body, with a smooth finish.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are present on the top surface as subtle slots and on one side as a prominent circular grille. These provide airflow for cooling and exhaust, with the side vent being larger and more open.
attribute_window_presence: A large, dark, semi-transparent glass window is present on the front door, occupying most of the left side and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
